title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 534.040 - Estates comprehended in sections 534.010 to 534.030
text:
534.040.  Estates comprehended in sections 534.010 to 534.030. — Sections 534.010 to 534.030 shall extend to and comprehend terms for years, and all estates, whether freehold or less than freehold.
(RSMo 1939 § 2834) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 2448; 1919 § 2996; 1909 § 7658
